name: Test Traces to Requirement
description: Every test case traces to the requirement it verifies (bidirectional requirements-to-test traceability).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-7 obj 1-2: test cases trace to requirements and requirements trace to test cases, ensuring complete coverage of requirements by tests.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
